title: Taspir III

{{Quote|It's an Imperial controlled planet, a real paradise.|Kyle Katarn to Jaden Korr|<ref name="JKJA" />}}
'''Taspir III''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
[[File:Taspir.png|thumb|left|200px|The surface of Taspir III.]]
The surface of Taspir III was, in large part, covered with mountain crags divided by lakes and rivers of molten [[Magma/Legends|lava]], and had constant downpour of [[Acid rain/Legends|acid rain]]. During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], it was known that there was a chain of [[Imperial Remnant]] fortresses and manufacturing plants on the surface which was responsible for the considerable amount of pollution in the atmosphere.<ref name="JKJA" />

==History==
After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the collapse of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] the planet remained under the control of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]] and his [[Pentastar Alignment]]. It would remain under Imperial rule under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]].<ref name="TEA" />

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], the presence of the Imperial Remnant was large here, as the fortresses and processing plants were being defended by several platoons of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[hazard stormtrooper]]s, as well as numerous [[Jumptrooper/Legends|jumptroopers]], [[New Reborn]], and [[Sith cultist/Legends|Sith Cultists]]. It was there that [[Rosh Penin]] was held captive after having fallen to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Despite, or perhaps because of this, he managed to get a message out to the [[Jedi Praxeum]], prompting [[Kyle Katarn]] and his former apprentice, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] to launch a rescue [[Mission to Taspir III|mission]]. [[Tavion Axmis]]' apprentice, [[Alora (Dark Jedi)|Alora]] met her destiny, having been killed in a fierce [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] by Jaden Korr. It was also where Korr chose his [[Light side of the Force/Legends|path]] within [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], having overcome his anger at Rosh's betrayal and refusing to kill his friend. Once the Cultists and Imperial forces had been cleaned out, Korr departed for [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to aid in the final [[Battle of Korriban (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|confrontation]] between the Disciples and the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="JKJA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
